creator: rainbow@sanitylinux.org
text:
(In reply to Romain Tartière from comment #6)
I think a warning from the script is perfectly reasonable.
The webrick server, as it stands, doesn't ping you with a message like the Passenger version. Hence why I had no idea about the deprecation until I went looking to figure out why my puppetmaster didn't work. Adding one to the rc.d script would save a lot of people a lot of headache :)
